{{Infobox artifact
| name = Origin Shroud
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Origin Shroud]] is a device made from four priceless treasures that hides the origin of existence.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Origin Shroud]] resembles a living, shifting thread made from smoke and shadow.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Origin Shroud]] is a concealing item made by [[the Mad King]] and repaired by [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] stayed under the [[Origin Shroud]] for a long time.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
